parameters.query:
SELECT p."IdPac", p."Nombre",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") AS telefono,
  MAX(c."Fecha") AS ultima_cita
FROM "Pacientes" p
INNER JOIN "DCitas" c ON c."IdPac" = p."IdPac" AND c."IdSitC" = 5
WHERE p."Inactivo" IS NULL
  AND (p."AceptaWhatsApp" = true OR p."AceptaWhatsApp" IS NULL)
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p."IdPac", p."Nombre", p."TelMovil", p."Tel1"
HAVING MAX(c."Fecha") < {{ $json.fechaLimite }}
ORDER BY MAX(c."Fecha") DESC
LIMIT 50
